title: thelypteris schippii
intro: Thelypteris schippii, also known as the Guadalupe fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Thelypteris schippii include its ability to aid in the treatment of various ailments, such as fever, arthritis, and digestive issues, due to its antiseptic and analgesic properties. Thelypteris schippii can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
